title: Garage Certification Artifact
description: Signed wrapper over audit classification and artifact hashes. Merge-blocking. Must be cryptographically signed. Signature must be validated before merge is permitted.

work_packet_id.description: References the WORK_PACKET this certification covers.

target_repo.description: Child repository this certification applies to.

doctrine_version.description: Doctrine version at time of certification. Must match WORK_PACKET.doctrine_version.

audit_status.description: Derived from auditor classification. PASS only when audit classification is PASS. Any FAIL_EXECUTION or FAIL_SCOPE maps to FAIL.

sanitation_passed.description: True only when SANITATE phase produced sanitation_status === PASS. False if sanitation failed or was not run. Certification requires sanitation_passed === true. Fail closed if missing.

heir_valid.description: True only when mount_receipt.heir_valid === true. False if HEIR validation failed or heir.doctrine.yaml was absent. Certification requires heir_valid === true. Fail closed if missing or false.

auditor_signature.description: Cryptographic signature produced by signature_engine. Format: hmac-sha256:<base64-encoded-signature>.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of all artifacts listed in WORK_PACKET.required_artifacts, sorted alphabetically, concatenated as bytes.

failure_reasons.description: Empty array when audit_status is PASS. Populated with specific failure reasons when FAIL.
